Equity Research Analyst Note

To: Investors of BrightStar Holdings
Subject: Anticipated Q4 Earnings

Dear Investors,

We are providing an update on BrightStar Holdings ahead of their Q4 earnings release scheduled for next week. Dr. Alex Tan Wei Ming, our lead analyst, expects the company to post a revenue increase of approximately 12% compared to the previous quarter. Our projections are based on the positive market trends and internal efficiencies recently implemented. However, the project status for the new software rollout remains unclear, which might impact future earnings.

We have received confirmation from Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, CFO of BrightStar, that no major changes in the project plan have occurred since our last report. As per the Sale and Purchase Agreement (the "SPA"), the company will finalize its stake acquisition in TechWave Pte. Ltd., UEN: T1234567X, by the end of the month. This SPA should solidify BrightStar's market position. Investors will be keen to see how this aligns with their strategic objectives.

For any inquiries, please contact our office at +65 6123 4567 or email us at research@brightstar-sg.com. You may also access detailed reports through our portal using your unique link: https://secure.brightstar-sg.com/user/S1234567A.

Thank you for your continued support.

Best regards,

Ravi Kumar
Equity Research Department
BrightStar Holdings
